3216790.name: Iron Decree
3216790.description:
In Iron Decree, you play as a Paladin either solo or as a team of 4, pitted against the hordes of a necromantic cult; you are tasked with defending various fortresses in a grand fantasy war. Arm yourself with spells, build wards to repel evil, and fight to the bitter end.

UNLEASH ARCANE FURY

Experience relentless action inspired by '90s shooters, round based zombie survival games, and dungeon-crawling classics. Wield magic and melee together, chaining devastating combos to crush your enemies. Unlock potions, spells, and enchanted weapons mid-run, and drink mystical brews to unleash powerful bonuses that turn the tide of battle.

FIGHT THE IMPERIUM

Explore a grimdark fantasy world, uncover hidden secrets, and protect the derelict fortresses of a crumbling empire. A brutal war rages between an insurgency and radical Imperium necromancers who wield forbidden magicks for profit. Choose your path: purge the heretics or uncover the dark truth behind the endless conflict. Defend mystical gravesites, enchanted libraries, sacrificial chapels, and more as you fight to decide the fate of the realm.

FORGE YOUR LEGEND

Upgrade your character and arsenal as you survive each round. Unlock a huge arsenal of weapons, master unique spells, and discover powerful enchantments, potions, and treasures. Mix and match different effects to craft deadly combos and tailor your build to your specific playstyle.

INCLUDES LEVEL EDITOR AND WORKSHOP SUPPORT!

Create your own maps, with inbuilt support for custom levels created in the game itself, or explore user created maps on the workshop.

Key Features

  • Spellcasting Fantasy: Feel like a powerful wizard or a ruthless paladin, gain strength in each play session but slowly master each spell's mechanics with every new run.

  • Varied Combat: Invest in the playstyle you prefer. Choose between swords, axes, maces and a plethora of spells and upgrade them during gameplay.

  • Additional Objectives: Complete optional objectives and discover secrets in various levels.

  • High-Level Gameplay: A round-based horde mode where you survive in diverse environments.

  • Progression: Use souls earned during gameplay to purchase upgrades and new weapons.

  • Enemy Variety: Various enemies will appear in different rounds, each with unique movesets that require different combat approaches.

英语*
